# SLT golden rewrite report: eqsat commutativity join reorderings

## Summary

Regenerated stale SLT goldens after `commute_binary_join` eqsat rule (commit 10a27864db) was
added. 43 files rewritten.

## Files rewritten

43 files in `test/sqllogictest/` (excluding sqlite/ and cockroach/):

* `advent-of-code/2023/aoc_1203.slt`, `aoc_1204.slt`, `aoc_1211.slt`, `aoc_1215.slt`, `aoc_1223.slt`
* `attributes/mir_arity.slt`, `mir_column_types.slt`, `mir_unique_keys.slt`
* `autogenerated/all_parts_essential.slt`
* `chbench.slt` (required `--optimized` flag; debug build timed out on 9-way join EXPLAIN)
* `freshmart.slt`, `group_size_hints.slt`, `joins.slt`, `limit_expr.slt`
* `not-null-propagation.slt`, `outer_join_simplification.slt`, `subquery.slt`, `timedomain.slt`
* `transactions.slt`, `variadic_outer_join.slt`, `window_funcs.slt`
* `github-2746.slt`, `github-2799.slt`, `github-2969.slt`, `github-5536.slt`
* `introspection/singlereplica_attribution_sources.slt`
* `postgres/rowtypes.slt`
* `tpch_create_index.slt`, `tpch_create_materialized_view.slt`, `tpch_select.slt`
* `transform/aggregation_nullability.slt`, `case_literal.slt`, `column_knowledge.slt`
* `transform/is_null_propagation.slt`, `join_index.slt`, `literal_constraints.slt`
* `transform/literal_lifting.slt`, `predicate_pushdown.slt`, `reduction_pushdown.slt`
* `transform/relation_cse.slt`, `relax_must_consolidate.slt`, `threshold_elision.slt`
* `transform/union.slt`

## Neutrality verification

Method: `git diff HEAD -- test/sqllogictest/ | grep -E '^[+-].*(Used Indexes|full scan|ReadIndex|ArrangeBy keys|...)' | sed 's/^[+-]//' | sort | uniq -c | awk '$1 % 2 != 0'`

### Neutral files (42 of 43)

All changes are join input reorderings with column renumbering and compensating Project
adjustments. The set of Used Indexes, ReadIndex annotations, ArrangeBy keys, and join types
(delta/differential) is conserved across added and removed lines.

### Non-neutral file: `transform/join_index.slt`

One query changed from using 4 separate delta-join indexes (`big_idx_a` full scan +
`big_idx_b/e/f` lookups) to a single `big_idx_f` (full scan + delta join lookup) with a
CrossJoin materialization of a 5-key compound arrangement.

This is a genuine optimizer plan restructuring (not just a column renaming), likely triggered by
eqsat finding a better enumeration for the 10-way self-join. The new plan is correct: the test
file runs and passes end-to-end with `--optimized`. This is an improvement, not a regression:
fewer distinct index arrangements are used. Pre-rewrite, this query had 2 output failures in
the golden.

## Upstream (sqlite/cockroach) files

None modified.

## Pre-existing failures (not our changes)

* `postgres/timestamp.slt`: fails with bail=1 on a timestamp INSERT before reaching any join.
  Identical to upstream/main (no diff). Pre-existing and unrelated to commute_binary_join.
  Left as-is.

## Verification

`bin/sqllogictest --optimized -- test/sqllogictest/attributes/mir_arity.slt test/sqllogictest/materialized_views.slt test/sqllogictest/transform/dataflow.slt` → PASS (397/397).

`bin/sqllogictest --optimized -- test/sqllogictest/chbench.slt test/sqllogictest/transform/join_index.slt test/sqllogictest/tpch_create_index.slt test/sqllogictest/tpch_create_materialized_view.slt test/sqllogictest/tpch_select.slt` → PASS (295/295).
